creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
Oops! Incomplete patch for Makefile.  Here is the complete patch:
--- ../curl/Makefile    2013-07-01 21:17:17.000000000 -0700
+++ Makefile    2013-07-01 21:54:57.000000000 -0700
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: head/ftp/curl/Makefile 318741 2013-05-22 01:32:58Z bdrewery $

 PORTNAME=    curl
-PORTVERSION=    7.24.0
-PORTREVISION=    3
+PORTVERSION=    7.31.0
 CATEGORIES=    ftp ipv6 www
 MASTER_SITES=    http://curl.haxx.se/download/ \
         LOCAL/sunpoet
@@ -208,7 +207,7 @@
 .endif
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MEXAMPLES}
     ${MKDIR} ${EXAMPLESDIR}/
-    cd ${WRKSRC}/docs/examples/ && ${INSTALL_DATA} README Makefile.example
makefile* *.c *.cc ${EXAMPLESDIR}/
+    cd ${WRKSRC}/docs/examples/ && ${INSTALL_DATA} README Makefile.example
makefile* *.c ${EXAMPLESDIR}/
 .endif
 .endif
-- 
R. Kevin Oberman, Network Engineer
E-mail: rkoberman@gmail.com
